positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a friendly, fantastical forest scene, rendered in a clean, bold linework style with flat color blocks and high contrast. The central focus is a whimsical, floating island ecosystem where oversized bioluminescent flora and fauna interact. Include stylized elements like curling moss, glowing mushrooms, and gentle, stylized forest creatures (e.g., pixies and small whimsical animals). The composition must be centered and highly decorative, suitable for apparel printing. Use a palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, lime green, and soft magenta accents. Dramatic, even lighting to showcase silhouettes and details. Vector art style, suitable for textile printing, seamless background elements.
negative: lowres, bad anatomy, deformed, blur, blurry, noise, grain, signature, watermark, text, logo, writing, messy, poor quality, out of focus, realistic, photo, photographic, 3d, extra limbs
